overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black sports car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit commercial streets, passes beneath an elevated highway underpass with green lighting, and eventually parks in a back alley. The scene features futuristic cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards and dense urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: driving a black sports car with white racing stripes through wide city streets

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisement displaying colorful graphics between buildings
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and neon accents
tall futuristic building with glowing signage and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial boulevard in a futuristic city at night. The camera follows a black sports car driving forward between towering neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards. The streets are empty of pedestrians, with only sparse vehicle traffic visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with industrial concrete structure

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath elevated highway with green fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive beneath the concrete overpass with green-tinted lighting

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with thick support pillars spanning the road
industrial lighting fixtures casting green illumination on the concrete walls
thick structural columns supporting the overhead highway deck

segments.scene_description: The car enters a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to a sheltered concrete corridor with green fluorescent lighting. Industrial debris and pipes line the sides of the road as the vehicle continues forward under the massive concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with dense neon signage

events.description: exits underpass back into open city streets with visible sky
makes a sharp right turn at intersection to enter narrower street

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections and making turns through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving in the opposite direction past the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
multi-story structure with glowing windows and storefront signage
vertical signage with Japanese characters illuminated in red and blue

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene returns to open streets with visible sky and dense neon signage. The car makes a sharp right turn at an intersection, passing a yellow sports car driving in the opposite direction. Japanese-inspired neon signs and commercial storefronts line both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with overhead wires and signage

events.description: slows down while navigating through tighter commercial streets

agents.ego_description: driving through narrower streets lined with dense neon signage and storefronts

entered.detail: corner store with illuminated blue signage and glass entrance
traditional-style hanging lanterns with red glow suspended over street
dense network of power lines and cables crisscrossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through narrower commercial streets with dense overhead wiring and traditional street lanterns. The car slows down as it navigates the tighter urban environment, passing a pharmacy with bright blue signage on the right. Neon signs in various colors illuminate the street from all directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley parking area with garage doors

events.description: comes to a complete stop and parks in the narrow alley behind buildings

agents.ego_description: pulling into a narrow back alley and parking the vehicle next to dumpsters and garage doors

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating narrow corridor
closed corrugated metal roll-up doors for building access
large industrial waste containers lined against the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car entering a narrow back alley with tall walls on both sides. The vehicle slows to a stop and parks next to metal garage doors and industrial dumpsters. The lighting becomes dimmer and more mixed as the car comes to rest in the enclosed parking area, with the neon glow of the main street visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a black sports car as it travels from a wide, neon-lit boulevard into the dim seclusion of a narrow back alley. It begins on a sprawling commercial street flanked by towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards before the vehicle enters a sheltered concrete underpass illuminated by green fluorescent lighting and lined with industrial pipes. As the car exits the underpass and returns to the open night sky, it makes a sharp right turn past a yellow sports car, moving into a denser district filled with Japanese-inspired signage and overhead wiring. The scene then shifts into narrower streets where the car slows past a bright blue pharmacy sign and various colorful neon storefronts. Finally, the vehicle turns off the main road and glides into a dark alleyway, coming to a complete stop beside metal garage doors and industrial dumpsters.
